MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria torreano.
Appearances:
Elizabeth Mcdonald, Esq. for Plaintiff American Business Leasing, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant N.L. Barnes Construction Co., Inc.,
Principal of $37,200.54
Attorney's fees of $1,506.02
Late charges of $4,586.23
Proper tax of $1,018.36
Fair market value of the equipment of $1,000.00
Collection fees of $450.00
Costs of $304.50
Interest of $10,438.57 For the total of $56,504.22.
Judgment signed in open court.
